baseScanReturnNotice.summary: BaseScan was unable to update the public token page due to insufficient or inconsistent information. The notice listed common blockers: website accessibility or safety, unclear token/project information, placeholders, broken links, insufficient founder/team transparency with public professional profiles, and sender email not matching the project domain.
baseScanReturnNotice.mustNotClaim: Do not say BaseScan token profile is approved, published, accepted, or complete until BaseScan publishes the token profile.

currentEmailState.ownerActionRequired: Create and test a working gcagochina.com domain email, publish it on support/about/team pages, and submit to BaseScan from that address when possible.

founderEvidencePacket.reviewerWording: Tim Chen is the published founder, CEO, and project lead for GCA. The official-domain profile provides role scope and public evidence links; add LinkedIn later only if BaseScan specifically requires third-party social-network evidence.

teamTransparency.ownerActionRequired: Include https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html in the next BaseScan submission. If BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile, publish a LinkedIn profile as stronger external evidence.

remediationChecklist.evidence: The public site is available at https://gcagochina.com/ and public checks validate the readable site, sitemap, robots, logo, and core pages.
Readable project profile, start page, whitepaper, product spec, trust center, and status pages are published.
tools/check_public_site.py checks public pages, canonical identity, current GCA/USDT route, and raw JSON routing.

Official-domain team page is published at https://gcagochina.com/team.html and the Tim Chen public professional profile is published at https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html. A LinkedIn profile can still be added if BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile.

The published primary email is currently GCAgochina@outlook.com. BaseScan specifically flagged sender email/domain mismatch. The 2026-05-27 read-only DNS snapshot shows MX, SPF, and DMARC missing, with DKIM selector required, so a working gcagochina.com email should be configured before resubmission. The public DNS Entry Worksheet at https://gcagochina.com/domain-email.html#worksheetTitle lists the MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC fields to copy from the mailbox provider.
Official Telegram, X, GitHub, support, whitepaper, brand kit, and website URLs are available as full URLs.

requiredBeforeReady: Create and publish a working gcagochina.com domain email, then submit from that domain email or clearly explain the official primary email in the form.
Use the DNS Entry Worksheet at https://gcagochina.com/domain-email.html#worksheetTitle when copying MX, SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records from the mailbox provider.
Fix the 2026-05-27 DNS snapshot blockers: add MX, SPF, DMARC, and DKIM records, rerun the checker with the provider DKIM selector, and archive inbound/outbound evidence.

Include the published Tim Chen professional profile URL https://gcagochina.com/tim-chen.html in the next BaseScan submission, and add LinkedIn later only if BaseScan specifically requires a third-party social-network profile.
Re-run the public site checker after email/team-profile changes.
Run python3 tools/check_basescan_resubmission_readiness.py --json --require-ready and proceed only when readyForBaseScanResubmission is true.
Use the updated BaseScan reply template at https://gcagochina.com/platform-replies.html and include GitHub, team page, start page, support page, and whitepaper.

boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

reviewerChecklistBuilder.purpose: Map BaseScan return reasons to current public GCA evidence and identify the remaining sender-domain-email blocker before the final submission package.
runAfter: domain email evidence packet is ready
domain email switch plan has been reviewed
boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts

readyRequires: domain email evidence packet is complete
submissionPackageBuilder.blockedDraftMarker: DRAFT ONLY - DO NOT SUBMIT BASESCAN YET.
boundaries: does not touch wallets or contracts
